info.name: Petstore API — Production Grade Tests
info.description:
Production-grade API test suite for the Swagger Petstore API.
Follows trainer methodology: 1 positive + 1 negative per endpoint, full response validation (status, schema, types, headers, response time).

Base URL: https://petstore.swagger.io/v2
Auth: api_key header — value: special-key

Run via Newman:
  ./run_tests.sh
or manually:
  newman run petstore_collection.json -e petstore_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export results/report.html

exec: pm.test('Server is reachable — not a 5xx crash', function() {

item.name: TC-S-002 — Response is JSON not HTML

exec: pm.test('Response body is valid parseable JSON', function() {
pm.test('id is a number not a string', function() {

item.name: TC-P-002 — POST /pet — Missing required field: name

exec: pm.test('Missing name is rejected — 400 or 405', function() {
pm.test('Server does not crash on missing required field', function() {

item.name: TC-P-003 — POST /pet — Invalid status enum value

exec: pm.test('Invalid enum value is rejected — 400 or 405', function() {
pm.test('Server does not crash on invalid enum', function() {
pm.test('Request without auth is rejected or noted', function() {
pm.test('SECURITY: Unauthenticated access should return 401 or 403', function() {
console.warn('WARNING: Unauthenticated POST /pet returned 200 — auth not enforced!');

item.name: TC-P-005 — POST /pet — Extra unknown keys (mass assignment check)

exec: pm.test('Extra keys do not cause server error', function() {
pm.test('SECURITY: adminFlag not reflected in response', function() {
pm.test('SECURITY: secretScore not reflected in response', function() {

item.name: TC-P-006 — GET /pet/{id} — Valid pet + full schema check

pm.test('Negative petId does not crash server', function() {

exec: pm.test('SQL injection does not crash server', function() {

pm.test('Status is updated to pending', function() {

pm.test('Every pet has id and name fields', function() {

item.name: TC-P-015 — GET /pet/findByStatus — SQL injection in query param

exec: pm.test('SQL injection in query param does not crash server', function() {
